title: Beyond Dates: Why History Truly Matters

questions.sentence: History is much more than just old stories or a collection of dates and names.
By studying past events, we can clearly see what worked well and what didn't.
This knowledge can help us avoid repeating old mistakes.
Furthermore, history helps us understand the present world around us.
History also deeply shapes our identity, both as individuals and as groups.
These stories can motivate us to overcome challenges in our own lives.
